recommendation_summary: Research, implementation, and verification are separate enough to benefit from multi-agent orchestration.
recommendation_reasons: Game selection and coding are distinct workstreams.
A verifier can review gameplay and edge cases independently.

subagents.purpose: Evaluate candidate mini games and define the chosen game rules.
subagents.selection_rationale: The implementation should start from a settled game concept and rule set.
subagents.developer_instructions: Compare candidate games and write the chosen concept with core rules into .sonol/game-spec.md.
operational_constraints: The final game must be implementable in a single HTML file.
The controls must work on both desktop and mobile.

subagents.purpose: Implement the game from the defined rules.
subagents.selection_rationale: A dedicated implementation track is needed to turn the selected concept into code.
subagents.developer_instructions: Read .sonol/game-spec.md and implement the game in index.html.
operational_constraints: Use only plain HTML, CSS, and JavaScript without external CDNs.
Include score, restart, and game-over states.
